mapper.sql: SELECT b.board_id AS id, b.user_id AS userId, b.board_name AS name, b.layout_json AS layout, b.category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, u.user_name AS userName, b.create_time AS createTime, b.update_time AS updateTime FROM dashboard_board b LEFT JOIN dashboard_user u ON u.user_id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN dashboard_category c ON c.category_id = b.category_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_board (user_id, board_name, layout_json, category_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{layout}, #{categoryId})
mapper.update: UPDATE dashboard_board SET board_name = #{name}, layout_json = #{layout}, category_id = #{categoryId}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE board_id = #{id}
